payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Don't forget Pillars of Eternity II Deadfire comes out very soon, in just a few weeks. For those who haven't played the first Pillars of Eternity, you don't have to. The sequel gets you pretty up to speed if you haven't played, but if you have, you can carry over your save from the previous one. I recommend you play it if you have the time. This one is amazing-looking. They partnered with us, all of us get to voice cast members of the new game and there's free DLC where you get to download portraits and voice sets of Vox Machina from Critical Role to use in the game.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The glory of Grog in that issue.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Glory be to Grog.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We are too, Laura. We are, too. It would take about a mile journey to get to where they said this would be, so you have a few minutes. Is there anything you guys wish to do, prepare?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's why you're on the boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, did you think it was for another reason?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I just-- no!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Yasha, are you paddling?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so we would be at the front of the boat going--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The back of the boat would actually be up a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Bow up!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Each couple of splashing sounds that hit as the oars hit the water and the occasional crack of the water against the brook or a rock in the center, you being to maneuver your way through this dark tunnel with just the low light that you've been applying. It gets colder and colder the further down the tunnel you go and while it is moist, you begin to see your breath just in general this low in the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus, Laura.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Literally 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm glad I'm back.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The only light you have is the light from Caleb's Dancing Lights which he's re-upping as soon as it completes its one minute cycle each time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus, Laura.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Literally 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm glad I'm back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We are too, Laura. We are, too. It would take about a mile journey to get to where they said this would be, so you have a few minutes. Is there anything you guys wish to do, prepare?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh gosh!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Prepare? Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You've got your holy oil, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are we going to fight undead things? What is going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have time, you're traveling!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I forgot. Did you give me holy oil?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I believe or was it--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You gave me holy oil and you holy oil.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Holy water, not holy oil.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have it, apparently. Well, what am I supposed to do with it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You throw it at something that looks evil. It's pretty simple.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should I dip my bolts into it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't work that way, sadly. It's not--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a like a splash grenade.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Water balloon with glass.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How's the light in here, by the way?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you're so entranced by this, you glance down just in time to see one of those stones that's protruding from the river seems to have come out of nowhere. Before you have a minute to punch off, it hits you across the knee and bruises the heck out of it. Your whole leg starts throbbing and you're like, "Ah!" So your skiing is now (crashing splashes) underneath.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I've been practicing one technique! It's called wearing this ring of water walking! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sure, that's good!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tried and true!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Unfucked!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could literally be walking along side of the boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's a good idea! Can I ghost ride the whip?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me, you could be stealthing ahead at this moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! I'm going to gingerly--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just ghost ride.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Barefoot ski.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Barefoot it onto the water and see what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On the water? Okay. As you reach over the edge of the boat and slowly lower your tiny goblin feet across the surface, breaking the water (water splashing). (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a general dexterity check for me, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, not good, but it's dexterity, so six?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is fun! Hand me a rope, I'll water ski!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, Nott. That is five points of bludgeoning damage and it is attached to you. You now see a pitch black and gray spined octopus-type creature, that looks from the exterior like any other part of the cavern wall, but has these deep sunk red eyes at the top of its base and it's completely wrapped around the top of Nott, and is currently crushing down on top of her. I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a general dexterity check for me, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, not good, but it's dexterity, so six?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is fun! Hand me a rope, I'll water ski!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're so entranced by this, you glance down just in time to see one of those stones that's protruding from the river seems to have come out of nowhere. Before you have a minute to punch off, it hits you across the knee and bruises the heck out of it. Your whole leg starts throbbing and you're like, "Ah!" So your skiing is now (crashing splashes) underneath.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll try to pull myself back up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, it takes you a moment and Caleb, you go and help get Nott up onto the boat, but as you do, a little water logged, the water splashed over your face a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus, that's an intense water ski.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because at that moment the lights go out. As soon as you pull Nott up into the ship, there's a brief moment where Nott breathes and looks back up with a smile about to say thank you before you see, out of the corner of your eye, one of the stalagmites at the top of the ceiling detach, float down and open up, almost like an umbrella before it lands and collapses on top of Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) It's just like the rug!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah! What happened? What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With advantage because it was with a surprise attack on that one, so that would be a 19 to hit. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course that hits. Yes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Between the two of you, about ten minutes pass as you watch your two beefy companions, one after another, moving large stones and rocks, scooping them out of the way, some spilling and rolling into the water, other ones being pushed off to the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A little less blue.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's not that weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Past about a roughly ten-foot wide portion of this wall that has fallen in, part of the ceiling has come in and above it is just dirt. It's loose rock and pieces of well-carved stone and masonry that have been destroyed, apparently upon exiting whatever was beyond this wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I see what was giving me the arcane signature?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You feel it on the opposite, the other side of this rock slide.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we clear out these rocks?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think we just need to get closer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But we're right here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. What about you two beefcakes? Can you move these stones out of the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (grunting)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you make athletics checks to get through the endurance of pulling these stones out of the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's totally cocked, that was terrible. Athletics?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It looks like, whatever this trap is, the actual entire stone floor around you is a pressure plate that Frumpkin did not set off. It has not gone off since you've stepped on it, but as you're investigating and listening closely to the stone, you hear a very slow (clicking).

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Rogue shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's going to be a 26 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take five points of piercing damage as a long, metal bolt fires out of the hole and sticks you right in the front of the thigh.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah! Fuck! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I found a trap!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it spent now?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let me check. I'll see if there's any other triggers for this trap.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On this trap, at this floor point? You jump up and down. Make an investigation check if you want to, in the area.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, you step onto the platform. A moment passes. Two. No effect.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It feels like the triangle is down here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Evocation, right? Then the diamond--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can tell if you were to rotate it, it would line up. Triangle to triangle, that would bring the star to that one there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What would the diamond be?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a diamond right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does it look like it goes inside?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can give it a shot if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll go gingerly touch the base and see if it moves a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It does not shift at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is anyone on the platform?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Currently, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder if you have to stick something in the hole and twist it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I bet there's a key.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb is still going through the ritual.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck it, I'll stand up on the platform.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You watch as another one begins to slowly emerge and another begins to emerge from the ceiling. I need you all roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think I would have noticed that the circus bouncer looking in the urn did not get blown up, but also looked a little puzzled. So I'm going to go over and take a look at the same thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take a look at the other one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you go to look in the other urn, you glance over at the urn that Yasha was turned away from, and you see this glowing fire emerge from the urn in her direction. Just this small, glowing orb begin to shift out of the urn right towards her back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I ready to fire?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are. You get to make an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start with one of my blades.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to shoot a crossbow bolt at that fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. And that is a 19 against you Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Wait. Yeah, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, do your damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Is this sneak attack or no? I don't even know what this creature is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha is right next to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I get a saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No saving throw, but you do take 13 points of lightning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to die.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I deal 16 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, do you double it because it's a critical?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The dice are doubled. Not your modifiers, but the dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow. Okay. That's 28 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 28 points of damage. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All the dice are doubled?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Good god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you actually take no damage, because he was holding his reaction and as soon as it emerges, he fires. You watch as the orb dissipates. The faint, little motes of energy shift and vanish on the outside of the urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking at the other urn. Is anything happening?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So, going for initiative here folks. 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking at the other urn. Is anything happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as another one begins to slowly emerge and another begins to emerge from the ceiling. I need you all roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Here we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) No time to thank me.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) No! No time!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got another one for 826LA.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I rolled the same initiative. This is the worst initiative ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You got Yasha off to this side, going this way. Nott, you're not too far from there. Molly, you were off to the opposite side to look to the other edge. Caleb, where were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was where Yasha was. I went over to look at her urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right. So you were over by Yasha. Fjord, you were over by where you found the object. Frumpkin was-- ?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin would have been just 15 feet into the chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. And then Beau and Jester, where are you placed?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I would be probably be in between Fjord and Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was wherever those bodies where, because I was kneeling down and looking at them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. So that would be this relief right here, by Fjord's. All righty. And you watch as Molly-- actually Molly was making his way over there as this happened. And that one emerged.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It look like lightning corn on the cob.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Another one shifts out of the urn that you just had one emerge from.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's my own urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That Nott has destroyed. It dissipated, then the small motes (fwoosh) back into the urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! It's like never ending.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Now that I know it's there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's not a surprise, at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Not a surprise.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, the will-o'-wisps rolled a 26 for initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) No! No time!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got another one for 826LA.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I rolled the same initiative. This is the worst initiative ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You got Yasha off to this side, going this way. Nott, you're not too far from there. Molly, you were off to the opposite side to look to the other edge. Caleb, where were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was where Yasha was. I went over to look at her urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right. So you were over by Yasha. Fjord, you were over by where you found the object. Frumpkin was-- ?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin would have been just 15 feet into the chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. And then Beau and Jester, where are you placed?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I would be probably be in between Fjord and Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was wherever those bodies where, because I was kneeling down and looking at them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. So that would be this relief right here, by Fjord's. All righty. And you watch as Molly-- actually Molly was making his way over there as this happened. And that one emerged.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It look like lightning corn on the cob.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Another one shifts out of the urn that you just had one emerge from.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's my own urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That Nott has destroyed. It dissipated, then the small motes (fwoosh) back into the urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! It's like never ending.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Now that I know it's there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's not a surprise, at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Not a surprise.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, going for initiative here folks. 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh wow, all right. So we have Nott and Beau. All right, 20 to fifteen?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. We got Fjord. All righty. 15 to ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester and Yasha. All righty. Ten to five?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Rolled one, which makes me a two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I love it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'd say with searching around everything, it's been closer to 45 minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 19. 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 25 does hit. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Eight damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight points of damage for that one. Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I punch a ghost?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do hit it, but it doesn't take as much damage as you would expect. As you swing toward it, it gives resistance to your fist, and numbs it as you punch through it. It does react to the impact, but it's not quite as impactful as you hoped a swing that strong should have been.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You punched cotton candy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did, kind of-- stinging cotton candy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A little cold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Does that finish your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Finishing Beau and Nott's go-- Fjord, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I got a question. You said ten minutes on the boat as we were moving forward, ten minutes for him to cast detect magic, and another ten minutes for detect magic to run out, so it's been about a half an hour?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: If you guys want to take a short rest, about an hour or so to take a moment and take a breather. Use your hit dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. It is definitely magical.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. What kind?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What kind?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm allowed to know. It's in the book.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can ask nicely.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I would say abjuration.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What's in the fucking potion, Matt?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have to identify it to find out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll take some of the nice jewelry and stuff like that and the little vial. Are there any other doors or entrances or shoots?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. It ends here. There is a pit and you finally reached the bottom after pulling through. You've probably gone through about 40 or so equivalent outfits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does Detect Magic uncover anything else besides what he's already looking through?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Just the vial that he discovered.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Everybody else was resting up top while--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, can we do that?

payload.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, can we do that?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, you guys haven't taken a short rest yet. They're taking a short rest. You can go upstairs if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. It ends here. There is a pit and you finally reached the bottom after pulling through. You've probably gone through about 40 or so equivalent outfits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Just the vial that he discovered.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Everybody else was resting up top while--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, can we do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you guys want to take a short rest, about an hour or so to take a moment and take a breather. Use your hit dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's okay because I don't get my spells back with rests, so that's really good that I used it and everything.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I appreciate it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fjord, hold that up for me so I can tell you what it is. I will spend the next 10 minutes, with Fjord sitting in front of me and me looking at it and doing the ritual.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Ten minutes pass. You guys climb back up out of the pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fjord, hold that up for me so I can tell you what it is. I will spend the next 10 minutes, with Fjord sitting in front of me and me looking at it and doing the ritual.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you guys haven't taken a short rest yet. They're taking a short rest. You can go upstairs if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You want to rest first or do you want me to tell you what it is now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You can tell me what it is now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so 10 minutes that takes. Identify.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that is a potion of necrotic resistance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I don't have it. You have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: "When you drink this potion, you gain resistance to necrotic damage for one hour." Nice. Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Whenever we get done with the short rest, can Beau start peeking through and digging away at the collapsed entrance into that tunnel?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make an athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I sewed my thumb back on.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You guys complete a short rest as well. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You want to rest first or do you want me to tell you what it is now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You can tell me what it is now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so 10 minutes that takes. Identify.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I don't have it. You have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make an athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I sewed my thumb back on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Ten minutes pass. You guys climb back up out of the pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys head up and join. The rest of them are going to be resting for the next 45 or so minutes. You can join them if you want them to wait for you as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to, yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You spend about 30 minutes or so, and you maybe get about two feet into the rubble, and you're not sure how far back it goes. A lot of the stones now you're getting to are now too big for you to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that is a potion of necrotic resistance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I don't have it. You have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I sewed my thumb back on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Ten minutes pass. You guys climb back up out of the pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys head up and join. The rest of them are going to be resting for the next 45 or so minutes. You can join them if you want them to wait for you as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys complete a short rest as well. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Arcane recovery.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While you guys are finishing that up, Beau is rummaging through the rubble.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It wasn't good. Six. Slow going.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. You guys have all taken your time to short rest--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I sewed my thumb back on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Ten minutes pass. You guys climb back up out of the pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys head up and join. The rest of them are going to be resting for the next 45 or so minutes. You can join them if you want them to wait for you as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys complete a short rest as well. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Arcane recovery.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While you guys are finishing that up, Beau is rummaging through the rubble.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It wasn't good. Six. Slow going.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You spend about 30 minutes or so, and you maybe get about two feet into the rubble, and you're not sure how far back it goes. A lot of the stones now you're getting to are now too big for you to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Was there a little crawl space at the top that we could crawl through?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. The ceiling caved in on that side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well. It's just me and I rolled shitty.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You spend a good two minutes shifting on the rod the opposite direction where it locks. No movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we try a person to use the rod first before we start wasting spells?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah okay, I'll walk up and I'll grab the rod.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're weak, shouldn't we use a strong person?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The rod doesn't shift.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You move it the other way and it comes out, you have to put it back in and lock it into place, but it doesn't seem to shift or move.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What's the the top of the rod again? The top of that little spiral.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a small little metallic knob at the end.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to examine it, anything interesting about it? Just a small metallic knob?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Best you can look at it, it doesn't have any markings on it or anything unique, it's just a solid round knob end.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Like a lightning rod?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Something like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, you're strong. Why don't you go try and twist the thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll give it a try.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The slithering stops. (booming) You watch as your eyes catch something shift above you. That large square pillar that was locked in the ceiling, that dome underneath it opened up and a strange, translucent, cube-like creature comes descending from the center. I need you guys all to roll initiative. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Best you can look at it, it doesn't have any markings on it or anything unique, it's just a solid round knob end.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Like a lightning rod?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Something like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, you're strong. Why don't you go try and twist the thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll give it a try.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You spend a good two minutes shifting on the rod the opposite direction where it locks. No movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we think we need to cast unique spells into those bowls for each of the three schools of magic? Which is what Jester said.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We heard you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (angrily) No, it's fine!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm trying to figure out, how do you cast necrotic damage on a bowl?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, I could Inflict Wounds on it or something, or Toll the Dead on the bowl.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You want to Inflict Wounds on one of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well no, I'm going to use a cantrip because it's better. So I'm going to Toll the Dead on--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is it? Evocation?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Necrotic, divination, and evocation. So I'll try to Toll the Dead on one of the bowls, the one that is sitting on the diamond.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You cast Toll the Dead. The dark arcane energy from Toll the Dead begins to gather around the hand of Jester, and as you release the spell you watch this burst of necrotic energy siphon back and immediately attach itself to the very top of this metallic rod. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's absorbed and there's a moment of pause before you feel (banging sound).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's do the other two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, is it turning?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear a shifting of stone-- this faint slithering sound begins to fill the chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Other two! Or maybe not.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yes, they are very gone. Well, the torch has been your main light source since you--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We attack at advantage? For how long?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There is a giant, earthen cat's claw holding it on the corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Zero speed, or slow speed?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It can be restrained, that thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can it? By magic, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, magic holds it in place.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So it's zero speed, it doesn't go anywhere?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Restrained, it's the restrained condition.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct, yep, for the spell's duration.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How long does the spell last?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One minute. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is it concentration?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Don't break that concentration!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This giant cat paw has grasped around and is holding the cube in place, its claws dug into it, made of earth and dirt and stone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a question, is there any light in here at all?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Aside from the torch that Yasha has, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay so there's dim light then, from the torch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Because my globules are gone.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 39 points of damage in one round of combat. Not too bad!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's damage equal to your level, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's an additional four so that's 32 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That builds, goblin?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Class features.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty sure it's equal to your level.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it racial features or class features?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I'll look it up later!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It would be racial features.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: For which archetype? Spellcasting, Mage Hand? Oh shit, I should've used Mage Hand before!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Remember, that's actually your archetype.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what I should be doing!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Class features.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Regardless, you did a lot of damage to it, so 32 with your level added to it, as you strike it with your crossbow.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Then I will move around that way, yes, as far as possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And I'll shoot again. Why not? With advantage still?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's restrained.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 18 plus a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven more points of damage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty, it's now the gelatinous cube's turn. It's going to attempt to break free of the large Earthen Paw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: High-level rogue was still pretty cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What was it, like 79 points of damage you did in one round?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that was great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends Nott's turn. Fjord, what are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use my speed to run on this side of the cube closer to you, as far back against that wall as possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 25. Right there. 30 will be all the way back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 30's perfect. Eldritch Blast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: At advantage. That's cocked. That natural 19's not bad, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That'll hit. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Great. Ten plus four, that's 14 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14 points of damage. This thing is just getting hit with crossbow bolts and the blasts on the sides of it. It's taking damage, but it's a hardy mass of slime and gelatin.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a hardy mallow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Indeed. That finish your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, it does.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Your cat moved aside. I did that to fuck with you. Its engulf is an action, and it already used an action to break free. But it did move over and you guys basically moved out of the way. It's now right next to both Beau and Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: At disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's not disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just for attacks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is going to be-- what save?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 15 for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a strength check. So that would be plus two, that's a 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Gott verdammt! It's out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, it breaks free?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I thought it was going to stay there!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Beau's right next to it. It's going to slurp you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean it's not restrained?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it can still move as part of its action.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Half of its movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to (squelching).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. Who's it going for?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Who's it getting? My cat?! You motherfucker! (screaming and laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I'm assuming it takes like four points of damage immediately, my cat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How many hit points does it have?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Three? It's gone instantly!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did any of that trigger my sentinel?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You still got it for an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm doing Hold Person.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm taking a bit of fleece and doing some hand symbols and casting Silent Image.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You're casting--?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hold Person.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I pull off the belt again.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Sword at the ready.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One, two, three!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the three of you complete your incantations, the energy unleashed from the arcane and divine schools of magic, you watch as the energy disperses from the spell, and all three go (sucking sound) right into the center rod. It sits there shimmering from the impact. You guys back away, and it slowly goes cold again. On the opposite side of the chamber, you hear (grinding), and you watch as a false wall on the opposite end rotates open, leading you to a hallway on the opposite side that was previously closed. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well done, guys!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh man!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I cast Armor of Agathys for nothing.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: There's a very faint magical aura from the symbol in the center, but it seems largely clouded and marked off. It's like somebody had taped over a blacklit drawing. It's been marred and prevented from use, from what it seems at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I want to wait for Caleb at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I look around the room?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you need my help?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is he done yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Give me a second to blacklight the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, I love you, but we are missing out on other shit. I'm having extreme FOMO right now. Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're in the room. Let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm waiting for the narrator to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I told you, a couple times. You finished your spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, good, right. So I'm walking. Is there anyone between the bookshelf and me, where I am? Is Fjord?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, currently it looks like Jester and Yasha are in between that space.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Who's the closest?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're both equidistant.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I walk up between the two of them, and I have a 30 foot radius on the spell, so I'm basically doing this, but I'm very interested in the bookshelf obviously. I'm looking everywhere.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We have a week to think about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh man.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Something wicked this way comes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm so confused!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't have hardly any hit points!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's going to talk to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I tried to write as much as I could.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's okay, I have one spell slot left, it's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I've got a 2nd-level and a 1st-level.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we should run.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably run.
